column1: # Every parameter and local of the 442 debug functions.
# storage is from the DEMO build: register allocation may differ in
# retail, but the NUMBER of locals and their TYPES are what drive cc1's
# C_AUTO offsets are frame-pointer relative ($fp == $sp), so the real
# slot is sp + fsize + offset; we print the resolved sp+N.
# A name repeated inside one function is a distinct nested-block scope.
